description: Send secure PGP-encrypted messages to one or multiple receivers. SuiteScript 2.1 only.

methods.name: createEncryptor
methods.description: Creates an encryptor object for PGP encryption.

params.name: options.recipientKeys
params.description: Array of recipient public key IDs

methods.name: createDecryptor
methods.description: Creates a decryptor object for PGP decryption.

params.name: options.privateKey
params.description: The script ID of the private key
